top3.sql:
WITH january_inserts AS (
  SELECT 
    c.country_code_2,
    cc.country_name,
    DATE(c.insert_date) AS insert_day
  FROM cities c
  JOIN cities_countries cc ON c.country_code_2 = cc.country_code_2
  WHERE c.insert_date >= '2022-01-01' AND c.insert_date < '2022-02-01'
),
country_days AS (
  SELECT 
    country_code_2,
    country_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT insert_day) AS num_days
  FROM january_inserts
  GROUP BY country_code_2, country_name
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT insert_day) = 9
),
target_coun...

WITH january_inserts AS (
  SELECT 
    c.country_code_2,
    cc.country_name,

    COUNT(DISTINCT insert_day) AS num_days
